name: Rustavoid
short_desc: Self-hosted app to register products and companies to avoid
author: rodrigomescua
description: Rustavoid is a self-hosted web application built with Rust and Axum for registering products, services, and companies that delivered a bad experience, helping you avoid future repurchases. Features server-side rendered templates with Askama, async interactions via HTMX, and persistent storage using SQLite.
